ref: The woman knew what had happened to her. So she came trembling with fear and knelt down in front of Jesus. Then she told him the whole story.
text: Usio ǝmǝ mfó ǝnyǝ utsyǝ lekpo nkǝ lesatsyuǝ ǝbǝ wǝ lǝ ǝsuǝ. Nyaso lǝ sikpitete ku ketinkǝ ǝsuǝǝ, ɔ́bɔ úbǝ óse akonki lǝ Yesu eto akɔ. Nya ɔ́tɛyi wǝ lǝ ɔnukualɛ ǝsuǝ, lesa nǝ díbǝ.
translated: There was a man who had two sons. The younger one said to his father, "Father, give me my share of the estate." So he divided his property between them. Not long after that, the younger son got together all he had, set off for a distant country and there squandered his wealth in wild living.

ref: Because of me, you will be dragged before rulers and kings to tell them and the Gentiles about your faith.
text: Lǝ mɔ disi esoo, bookponko mi akpo lǝ Aba eto beninǝ ku baka eto ǝnǝmi. Lǝ mfóo, bɛtɛyi mǝ ku mba lenni Yudafɔ Ditiki Sɛɛ nǝmǝ.
translated: When this thing happened, I was in the bookshop and I saw Aba and Benin but I did not see Enemi. In the morning, Beteyi and the others went to the Jewish synagogue.

ref: It began just as God had said in the book written by Isaiah the prophet, “I am sending my messenger to get the way ready for you.
text: Lǝ lefe kɛntsyɛ nǝ léfe mǝǝ, Onanto eto unyǝlǝkǝtidi Yesaya áwɔni utsyǝ nkǝ Onanto átɛyi wǝ ubi nkǝ, “Mootsyese ɔtɔyɛ ntɔnsǝ. Wǝ lɔɔlɔ betidi utsyǝ itǝ fǝ bubǝ.
translated: The Lord has spoken through his servant Isaiah that God will send his messenger to prepare the way for him, saying, "Prepare the way for the Lord. Make a straight path in the desert for our God."

ref: But Jesus ordered them not to tell anyone what had happened. Then he said, “Give her something to eat.”
text: Nyaso Yesu ǝkǝ mǝ ato kekleke nkǝ bantɛyi kuutsyuǝ saa. Nya kamaa, ɔ́tɛyi mǝ nkǝ, “Bitǝ wǝ lesatsyuǝ lǝ udi.”
translated: Then Jesus told them a story about how they should always pray and never give up. He said, "There was a judge in a certain town."

ref: Some Pharisees asked Jesus, “Why are your disciples picking grain on the Sabbath? They are not supposed to do that!”
text: Nyaso Farisifɔ bǝtsyuǝ átɔ Yesu bǝnkǝ, “Beso fǝ bakasebi lǝǝyifo nko? Bo kɔfi mǝntǝ kusu bǝ beyifo nko lǝ Ɔnwɛditsyǝyi.”
translated: Then the Pharisees asked Jesus, "Why do your disciples break the tradition of the elders? For they do not wash their hands before they eat."
